Uuuuhh.. okay, I'm back here with a new bot. And also with a new bot card. I hope you like it, and I didn't waste my time, otherwise I'll be upset. But not enough to stop using it for my next bots.

Besides.. Yeah, it was originally Alastor's bot, but the author deleted it a long time ago, leaving only memories and inspiration for me to remake and modify the old bot into Vox. I hope the original author doesn't mind. Anyway, I'll mark them if they ask.

So, happy new year guys! It's too late to say this, but who's going to stop me?) I've been celebrating this new year with a fever, but I'd rather be with my girlfriend. Unfortunately, we live in two different parts of the city. But one day, my wish will come true, and we'll celebrate together^^

Uh.. Do whatever you want with my man, because the next bot will be human Vox again (that's not Vincent, ok).
